_doc: Second-provider alignment contrast to de-confound the alignment axis from the Featherless serving stack (the main external concern). Same base (Llama-3.1-70B), alignment varied, both on OpenRouter: Meta's safety-aligned instruct vs Nous's Hermes-3 (a reduced-refusal / steerable full finetune of the same base). If the permissive finetune leaks more than the aligned instruct HERE, the alignment ordering reproduces off Featherless. NOTE: Hermes-3 is a finetune, not a surgical abliteration, so this is directional corroboration on a second provider, not a clean isolator -- which is exactly the claim needed (the ordering is not Featherless-specific). Run against the DEFAULT synthetic canary panel so it is directly comparable to the Featherless instruct-vs-abliterated arm.
